svg.title: Dialogue lifecycle overview
svg.desc: A three-phase lifecycle. Setup runs Create, Topology and Cast roles left to right. Running is a Turn loop containing Orchestrate, Contribute and Human steps that repeats while not terminated. End is a Terminate node fanning out to five terminal statuses: done, provisional, stopped, budget, error.
svg.text: only done satisfies the goal — the other four are early or error exits
